creator: osharoiko@gmail.com
text:
Current FreeSWITCH ports are outdated: version in ports is 1.2.3 for a
	development version of port while current stable version is 1.2.17.

Fix: The patch attached to this PR will:
	* remove -devel suffix from freeswitch ports
	* update ports to the laest stable version
	* rename patch files to match names used by make update-patches
	* improve port to allow patches to contributed libraries

	Before patching please run:

	svn mv misc/freeswitch-pizzademo-devel misc/freeswitch-pizzademo
	svn mv misc/freeswitch-scripts-devel misc/freeswitch-scripts
	svn mv net/freeswitch-curl-devel net/freeswitch-curl
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core-devel net/freeswitch-core
	svn mv net/freeswitch-devel net/freeswitch
	svn mv net/freeswitch-insideout-devel net/freeswitch-insideout
	svn mv net/freeswitch-sbc-devel net/freeswitch-sbc
	svn mv net/freeswitch-vanilla-devel net/freeswitch-vanilla
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-build-getlib.sh.in net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-build_getlib.sh.in
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-build-modules.conf.in net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-build_modules.conf.in
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf-vanilla-autoload_configs-switch.conf.xml net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf_vanilla_autoload_configs_switch.conf.xml
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf-vanilla-sip_profiles-external.xml net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf_vanilla_sip_profiles_external.xml
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf-vanilla-sip_profiles-internal.xml net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-conf_vanilla_sip_profiles_internal.xml
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs-freetdm-Makefile.am net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs_freetdm_Makefile.am
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs-freetdm-mod_freetdm-Makefile.in net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs_freetdm_mod_freetdm_Makefile.in
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs-js-nsprpub-pr-include-md-_freebsd.cfg net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs_js_nsprpub_pr_include_md__freebsd.cfg
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs-js-nsprpub-pr-include-md-_freebsd.h net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs_js_nsprpub_pr_include_md__freebsd.h
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs-spandsp-configure.ac net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-libs_spandsp_configure.ac
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src-include-private-switch_core_pvt.h net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src_include_private_switch_core_pvt.h
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src-include-switch_types.h net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src_include_switch_types.h
	svn mv net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src-switch_core.c net/freeswitch-core/files/patch-src_switch_core.c

	And then apply included patch:
